recipes.name: Sheet Pan Lemon Garlic Chicken
recipes.description: A one-pan weeknight winner with bright lemon, roasted veggies, and crispy chicken thighs.
directions: Preheat oven to 425F.
Toss chicken, lemon, garlic, oil, salt, and pepper on a sheet pan.
Add potatoes around the chicken and roast 25 minutes.
Add asparagus for the last 10 minutes. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Classic Weeknight Spaghetti Bolognese
recipes.description: Slow-simmered meat sauce with a rich tomato base. Freezer-friendly.
directions: Brown ground beef over medium-high heat. Drain excess fat.
Add onion and garlic, cook until soft.
Stir in tomato paste, then add crushed tomatoes, oregano, and wine.
Simmer uncovered 25-30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Cook pasta per package. Serve topped with sauce and parmesan.

recipes.name: Chicken Tortilla Soup
ingredientLines: 1 14-oz can diced tomatoes with green chiles
Tortilla strips, lime, avocado, cilantro for serving
directions: Combine broth, beans, corn, tomatoes, and spices in a pot. Bring to a simmer.
Stir in shredded chicken and heat through, about 5 minutes.
Serve with tortilla strips, lime, avocado, and cilantro.

recipes.name: Baked Salmon with Dill Yogurt Sauce
directions: Preheat oven to 400F. Rub salmon with olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Bake on a lined sheet pan 12-15 minutes until cooked through.
Whisk yogurt, dill, lemon juice, and grated garlic for the sauce.
Serve salmon with a dollop of sauce.

recipes.name: Crockpot Pulled Pork
recipes.description: Set it and forget it. Feeds a crowd.
directions: Mix brown sugar and spices. Rub all over pork shoulder.
Place in crockpot with chicken broth. Cook on low 8 hours.
Shred with two forks, drain excess liquid, stir in BBQ sauce.
Serve on buns with coleslaw.

recipes.name: Broccoli Cheddar Soup
directions: Saute onion in butter until soft.
Add broccoli and broth, simmer 10 minutes.
Whisk flour into milk, pour into pot, simmer until thickened.
Stir in cheddar off heat. Season to taste.

recipes.name: Turkey Taco Skillet
recipes.description: Low-carb taco bowl cooked in one skillet.
ingredientLines: Sour cream and salsa for serving
directions: Brown turkey in a large skillet.
Add taco seasoning, beans, corn, and tomatoes. Simmer 10 minutes.
Serve topped with lettuce, cheese, sour cream, and salsa.

recipes.name: Honey Garlic Glazed Pork Chops
directions: Season pork chops with salt and pepper.
Sear in olive oil over medium-high 3-4 minutes per side.
Whisk honey, soy sauce, garlic, and vinegar. Pour into pan.
Simmer until glazed, flipping chops to coat. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Vegetarian Chili
recipes.description: Hearty three-bean chili, meatless but filling.
directions: Saute onion, pepper, and garlic until soft.
Add drained beans, tomatoes, and all spices including cocoa.
Simmer 30 minutes. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Serve with shredded cheese and sour cream.

recipes.name: Banana Oat Pancakes
directions: Blend bananas, eggs, oats, baking powder, cinnamon, and vanilla until smooth.
Let batter rest 5 minutes.
Cook 1/4 cup scoops on a buttered griddle over medium heat.
Flip when bubbles form. Serve with maple syrup.

recipes.name: Greek Chicken Bowls
directions: Toss chicken with olive oil and Greek seasoning.
Saute in a hot skillet 6-8 minutes until cooked through.
Assemble bowls with quinoa, chicken, veggies, feta, and olives.
Top with tzatziki.

recipes.name: Classic Beef Stew
directions: Toss beef cubes in flour, salt, and pepper.
Brown in olive oil in batches. Remove.
Saute onion, then add everything back plus remaining ingredients.
Simmer covered 90 minutes until beef is tender.
Remove bay leaves before serving.
